channel.title: QJS-MD Test Notebook
channel.description: Debug blog for testing all SVG chart plugin features.

item.title: Farm Prices fall 3.3%
item.description: U.S. farm prices slipped in January as lower prices for milk, cattle and major row crops pulled down a key government index, even as some specialty crops and poultry strengthened, the U.S. Department

item.title: Obsidian Chart Plugin Test
item.description: This note tests all chart types in the Obsidian plugin.

item.title: Getting Started
item.description: Learn how to build your own static site with qjs-md

item.title: SVG Debug: Scatter Plots
item.description: Testing scatter plot rendering with categories, variable radius, and edge cases.

item.title: Simple Map Test
item.description: Testing map with a simple colored background instead of huge image.

item.title: SVG Debug: Bar Charts
item.description: Testing bar chart rendering with vertical and horizontal orientations.

item.title: SVG Debug: Line Charts
item.description: Testing line chart rendering with single and multiple series.

item.title: SVG Debug: Heikin-Ashi Chart
item.description: Testing heikin-ashi candlestick rendering with OHLC data.

item.title: SVG Debug: Donut Chart
item.description: Testing donut chart rendering with various datasets.

item.title: SVG Debug: Map with Background
item.description: Testing the map renderer with the socal-map.svg satellite image as background and GeoJSON feature overlays.

item.title: SVG Debug: YAML Field Mapping with CSV
item.description: Testing the YAML front matter format with CSV data and custom field mappings.

item.title: Trout Sales Slip 6% in 2025
item.description: Released February 27, 2026, by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service, the annual Trout Production report shows the total value of fish sales to U.S. trout growe
